cards.back: A method of image processing that operates on images based on basic geometric shapes
A morphological operation that reduces the size of objects in an image by removing the smallest connected component
A morphological operation that increases the size of objects in an image by adding new pixels
A morphological operation that combines erosion and dilation to remove noise and small objects from an image
A morphological operation that combines dilation and erosion to remove noise and small objects from an image, and to fill small holes
